description: Closing Disclosure — generates and validates Closing Disclosure (CD) and HUD-1 settlement statements, enforces TRID tolerance checks, verifies proration accuracy, and blocks signing and disbursement when discrepancies exist.

hard_stops.label: CD Not Balanced Block Signing
hard_stops.logic: Closing Disclosure does not balance — total credits and debits do not reconcile. Block signing until corrected.

hard_stops.label: TRID Tolerance Exceeded Regenerate Required
hard_stops.logic: TILA-RESPA Integrated Disclosure tolerance limits exceeded — CD must be regenerated and a new 3-day waiting period may apply.

hard_stops.label: Settlement Not Signed By All Parties Block Disbursement
hard_stops.logic: Settlement statement has not been signed by all required parties — block disbursement.

soft_flags.label: Proration Adjustment Large
soft_flags.logic: Proration adjustment exceeds expected range — flag for review.

soft_flags.label: Closing Cost Above Estimate
soft_flags.logic: One or more closing costs exceed the Loan Estimate by more than the allowed tolerance — flag for buyer notification.

soft_flags.label: Cash To Close Change
soft_flags.logic: Cash to close amount has changed from the Loan Estimate — flag for buyer awareness.
